data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | China's Gold Reserves Rise for 17th Consecutive Month
data.description: The People's Bank of China increased its gold reserves by 160,000 ounces in March, bringing the total to 74.38 million ounces. According to NS3.AI, this accumulation translates to approximately 2,313.48 tons by the end of the month. This marks the 17th consecutive month of growth in China's gold reserves.

data.title: Economic Stress Points Emerge Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is generating multiple economic stress points, according to Crypto Rover. These pressures are affecting various sectors, including food, credit, inflation, and industrial supply. According to NS3.AI, the situation is exacerbating food-price risks, with Helios and the Kobeissi Letter highlighting concerns over rising costs. Bloomberg reports an increase in subprime delinquencies, while Emirates Global Aluminum notes disruptions in aluminum supply. Additionally, Saudi crude premiums are contributing to the economic strain.

data.title: Spot gold rose above $4,680 per ounce, up 0.66% on the day.
data.description: Gate data shows that spot gold has risen above $4,680 per ounce, up 0.66% on the day. (Gold10)

data.title: CryptoQuant：比特币长期持有者供应量重回增长区间
data.description:
CryptoQuant 分析师 Darkfost 指出，尽管地缘局势与宏观不确定性仍令风险资产承压，但市场中“偏向持有”的行为正在回升。链上数据显示，长期持有者（LTH）持有的 BTC 供应量开始逐步增加，意味着当前进入 LTH 类别的 BTC 数量已超过 LTH 的卖出量。需要注意的是，该指标基于 UTXO 统计，并不一定代表 LTH 主动加仓，而是部分在约 6 个月前形成且未被花费的 UTXO 从短期持有者（STH）自然转入 LTH。
数据方面，该指标在 11 月底一度降至约 -67.4 万 BTC（30 日均值），目前已回到正值区间，平均约 +30.8 万 BTC 进入 LTH 供应。历史上，此类转向曾多次领先于价格改善，但报告也强调，熊市中也可能出现类似反转，仍需持续观察其延续性。

data.title: Polymarket Data Shows Market Bets on StandX Valuation
data.description: Polymarket's latest data reveals market predictions regarding StandX's valuation. According to Foresight News, there is a 35% probability that StandX's fully diluted valuation (FDV) will exceed $200 million the day after its launch. The likelihood of the FDV surpassing $400 million is 14%, while the chance of it exceeding $800 million stands at 11%. The current trading volume in this prediction market has surpassed $1.29 million.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Turkey's Central Bank Conducts Gold-for-Lira Swap Auction
data.description: Turkey's central bank has initiated a traditional one-week auction to swap 4 tons of gold for Turkish lira. According to Jin10, this move is part of the bank's ongoing efforts to manage its monetary policy and stabilize the national currency. The auction reflects the central bank's strategy to leverage its gold reserves in exchange for local currency, aiming to bolster liquidity and support economic stability. This approach highlights Turkey's reliance on precious metals as a tool for financial management amid fluctuating economic conditions.

data.title: The People's Bank of China has increased its gold reserves for the 17th consecutive month.
data.description: The People's Bank of China reported that China's gold reserves stood at 74.38 million ounces (approximately 2,313.48 tons) at the end of March, an increase of 160,000 ounces (approximately 4.98 tons) month-on-month. At the end of February, reserves were 74.22 million ounces (approximately 2,308.5 tons), marking the 17th consecutive month of increases. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian President Reports Over 14 Million Ready to Defend Nation
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi announced that more than 14 million Iranians have expressed their readiness to defend the country. According to Odaily, Raisi emphasized his own commitment to being a warrior for Iran, stating that he has always been, is, and will continue to be dedicated to the nation's defense.

data.title: A major ONDO whale deposited 2 million ONDO tokens into OKX, worth approximately $506,000.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, five hours ago, a major ONDO whale deposited 2 million ONDO tokens into OKX, worth approximately $506,000. Last month, this same whale received 21.71 million ONDO tokens, worth approximately $5.98 million, and deposited 5.5 million ONDO tokens, worth approximately $1.5 million, into OKX and Coinbase.

data.title: UBS: Lowers its end-June gold price forecast to $5,200/oz
data.description: UBS: Lowered its end-June gold price forecast to $5,200/oz, citing cooling investor demand amid heightened market volatility. (Gold10)

data.title: French Service Sector Contracts Amid Middle East Conflict and Political Caution
data.description: On April 7, Jin10 reported that a commercial survey indicates a further contraction in France's service sector in March, attributed to weakened customer spending due to the Middle East conflict and corporate caution ahead of local elections. According to S&P Global, the final PMI for France's service sector fell to 48.8 in March from 49.6 in February, slightly improving from the preliminary figure of 48.3. The composite PMI also declined to 48.8 from 49.9 in February. S&P Global noted this marks the fastest decline in private sector business activity since October last year. The firm added that the ongoing U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran is impacting French businesses, affecting inflation and causing delays in customer orders and investments. Joe Hayes, Chief Economist at S&P Global Market Intelligence, stated, "There is significant uncertainty ahead, and given the domestic political environment, French businesses have become quite accustomed to this situation in recent years. Uncertainty hampers growth, and the inflation shock from the conflict increases the risk of stagflation in France."

data.title: ECB Official Warns of Potential Multiple Rate Hikes Amid Prolonged Iran Crisis
data.description: European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member, Wunsch, has indicated that if the crisis in Iran continues for an extended period, there could be multiple interest rate hikes. According to Jin10, Wunsch emphasized the potential economic implications of the ongoing situation in Iran, suggesting that sustained instability might necessitate further monetary policy adjustments by the ECB. The remarks highlight the interconnectedness of global geopolitical events and monetary policy decisions, underscoring the need for vigilance in monitoring international developments that could impact economic stability.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | UBS Lowers Gold Price Forecast to $5,200 per Ounce Amid Cooling Investor Demand
data.description: UBS has revised its gold price forecast for the end of June, lowering it to $5,200 per ounce. According to Jin10, this adjustment comes as market volatility increases and investor demand for gold cools. The decision reflects changing market dynamics and investor sentiment, which have been influenced by recent fluctuations in global financial markets. UBS's updated forecast highlights the challenges faced by investors in navigating the current economic landscape, where uncertainty and volatility are prevalent. The bank's analysis suggests that these factors are contributing to a shift in investment strategies, with gold losing some of its appeal as a safe-haven asset. As the market continues to evolve, UBS's revised outlook underscores the importance of monitoring economic indicators and investor behavior to anticipate future trends in the precious metals sector.

data.title: Italy's March Services PMI Falls Below Expectations
data.description: Italy's services sector experienced a contraction in March, with the Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) dropping to 48.8, according to Jin10. This figure is below the anticipated 50.9 and significantly lower than the previous month's value of 52.3, indicating a decline in service industry activity. The PMI, a key economic indicator, reflects the health of the services sector, with values below 50 signaling contraction. The unexpected decrease suggests challenges in Italy's economic recovery, as businesses face ongoing pressures.

data.title: ECB's Wunsch Open to Rate Hike Amid Ongoing Crisis
data.description: European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch has expressed openness to raising key interest rates at the upcoming April meeting. According to Jin10, Wunsch emphasized that a prolonged crisis necessitates a series of rate hikes to address economic challenges effectively. His remarks highlight the ECB's readiness to adjust monetary policy in response to persistent financial instability. The potential rate hike reflects the central bank's commitment to stabilizing the economy amid ongoing uncertainties.

data.title: Binance Futures to Update Leverage and Margin Tiers for USD-M Perpetual Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will implement updates to the leverage and margin tiers for several USD-M Perpetual Contracts on 2026-04-10 at 06:30 (UTC). The update is expected to be completed within approximately one hour. This change will affect existing positions opened before the update, and users are advised to adjust their positions accordingly to avoid potential expirations of futures running grids.

The contracts affected by this update include XPLUSDT, FFUSDT, 0GUSDT, WIFUSDT, WUSDT, ZENUSDT, LINEAUSDT, NMRUSDT, PROVEUSDT, BERAUSDT, SNXUSDT, KAITOUSDT, SUSHIUSDT, MOODENGUSDT, ERAUSDT, TRBUSDT, SPKUSDT, and BIOUSDT. For each contract, the leverage and margin tiers will be adjusted, impacting the notional value positions and maintenance margin rates. For instance, the leverage for positions between 0 and 5,000 USDT will remain at 51 - 75x with a maintenance margin rate of 1.00%, while other tiers will see changes in leverage and position limits.

Users holding positions in these contracts should review the new leverage and margin tiers to ensure compliance with the updated requirements. The changes are part of Binance's ongoing efforts to optimize trading conditions and risk management for its users. It is crucial for traders to stay informed about these updates to manage their positions effectively and mitigate any potential risks associated with the changes in leverage and margin requirements.

data.title: Sui Prime Treasury Capacity Increased to 7 Million SUI
data.description: The Sui ecosystem's liquidity staking protocol, Volo, announced an increase in the maximum capacity of its Sui Prime treasury to 7 million SUI. According to Foresight News, this adjustment aims to enhance the protocol's operational capabilities and support its growth within the ecosystem.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Samsung Expected to Benefit from AI Memory Demand in 2026, Analysts Say
data.description: Citigroup analysts have indicated that Samsung Electronics is likely to benefit from ongoing demand for AI inference memory in the latter half of 2026. According to Jin10, the analysts noted in a report that strong AI inference memory demand is expected to support Samsung's memory pricing throughout 2026, particularly for server DRAM products. The analysts project that Samsung's DDR5 RDIMM pricing will reach $1,402 in the third quarter, marking a 13% increase from the second quarter, significantly higher than the previously anticipated 5% quarter-on-quarter growth. They also pointed out that prolonged Middle East conflicts could slow the growth of memory chip prices in the second half of the year, while a quicker resolution of the conflicts might drive prices higher.

data.title: The central banks of France and Korea have begun cooperation on a framework for tokenized cross-border payments and digital assets.
data.description: The central banks of France and South Korea are collaborating on a framework for tokenized cross-border payments and digital assets. (Solid Intel)

data.title: France and South Korea Collaborate on Tokenized Cross-Border Payments
data.description: France and South Korea's central banks are collaborating on a framework for tokenized cross-border payments and digital assets. According to Odaily, this partnership aims to explore the potential of digital currencies in enhancing international financial transactions. The initiative reflects a growing interest among global financial institutions in leveraging blockchain technology to streamline and secure cross-border payments.
